name: Red Skelton
blurb: A vaudeville-bred clown who ruled TV variety for two decades.
bio: Red Skelton (1913-1997) was an American entertainer whose long-running variety program, The Red Skelton Show, ran from 1951 to 1971, built on broad physical clowning and characters like Clem Kadiddlehopper drawn from his vaudeville roots.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
